sources.title: THE MACALUSO SISTERS 2020 Trailer
sources.description: THE MACALUSO SISTERS 2020 Trailer A movie by Emma Dante

metadata.Plot: Maria, Pinuccia, Lia, Katia and Antonella are five sisters who live in an apartment in Palermo. When Antonella accidentally dies, the sisters' relationships are turned upside down for the rest of their lives.
metadata.Writer: Emma Dante, Giorgio Vasta, Elena Stancanelli
metadata.Actors: Alissa Maria Orlando, Susanna Piraino, Anita Pomario
